Motion To Vacate Default Judgment An Order To Show Cause
Off Calendar Aug-15-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Defendant David GIzzarelli (415-285-3368), appearing in pro per
Elizabeth MacDonlad, Esq. (415-922-5939), appearing for plaintiff/ opposing party Chase Bank USA, N.A.

RULING:
DEFENDANT DAVID GIZZARELLI'S Motion To Vacate Default Judgment And Order To Show Cause
Plaintiff submitted to the tentative ruling and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows -- DEFENDANT DAVID GIZZARELLI'S Motion To Vacate Default Judgment And Order To Show Cause IS GRANTED, DEFAULT VACATED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jun-27-2008 Denied
